profile_basis.note: Largest unowned non-Eigh fj-dispatch row after pass210 reprofile while fj-lax dense/linalg files were reserved by IcyGlacier.

lever_tested.description: When both vmap dot operands already have batch_dim 0, call batch_paired_i64_vector_dot directly on the borrowed input Values before the existing move_batch_dim_to_front(..., 0) clone path.
lever_tested.revert_reason: RCH candidate rebench did not clear the Score >= 2.0 keep gate.

candidate.queue_note: RCH ignored the vmi1153651 worker hint and selected vmi1227854; unrelated jobs were active, but the candidate was flat even on median and below the keep gate.

isomorphism: The candidate called the same batch_paired_i64_vector_dot implementation as the old path after no-op leading-axis moves.
Row-major batch order, width iteration order, i64 wrapping multiply/add behavior, output dtype, output shape, batch dimension, and fallback/error behavior were unchanged.
No floating-point arithmetic, RNG, ordering tie-break, or nondeterministic surface was introduced.

decision.reason: Median speedup was 0.996x and conservative speedup was 0.921x, so Impact was zero and Score was below 2.0.
decision.next_route: Do not repeat leading-axis no-op clone bypass for paired I64 dot. Reprofile and attack a different dispatch primitive or a deeper algorithmic/layout primitive.
